sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: 1. FC Union Berlin has shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, with notable attacking output (8 goals scored) but defensive vulnerabilities (11 conceded). Hamburger SV struggles offensively, managing only 2 goals in their last 5 matches, while conceding 8, indicating poor form.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Union Berlin has the upper hand with a win (2-0) and a draw (2-2) against Hamburger SV. This suggests Union Berlin might have a psychological edge at home.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Union Berlin ranks 6th in goals scored (8) but 16th in goals conceded (11), showing a balanced attack but leaky defense. Hamburger SV, positioned 15th, has scored only 2 goals, highlighting their struggle to convert chances.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Union Berlin’s home advantage at An der alten Försterei, combined with Hamburger SV’s poor away form (0-5 loss to Bayern), tilts the game in Union’s favor. The referee’s tendency for yellow cards (3.9 per game) suggests a physical match.
